mapper.select: SELECT count(id) FROM teacher WHERE is_confirmed = 1
SELECT count(id) FROM teacher WHERE is_confirmed = 0
SELECT count(id) FROM skill WHERE status = 'pending'

SELECT u.id, u.role_id AS roleId, u.name, u.email, u.status, u.create_time AS createTime, p.id AS phdId, p.student_id AS studentId, p.enrollment_date AS enrollmentDate, t.id AS teacherId, t.is_confirmed AS isConfirmed, p.is_participating_review AS isParticipatingReview FROM user u LEFT JOIN phd p ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON u.id = t.user_id
AND u.role_id = 2
AND u.role_id = 1
AND (u.name LIKE concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.student_id LIKE concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND u.status = #{status}
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
SELECT count(id) FROM phd WHERE is_participating_review = 1
